en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Iraq Statutory Labor Insurance documentation in the Iraq Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

- For Federal Iraq: the Employer Registration Certificate can be obtained through the official Daman digital platform.\n- For Kurdistan Region: the certificate can be requested directly from the local Social Security Directorate under the KRG Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs.

Please upload your company’s valid Employer Registration Certificate issued by the competent social security authority (Federal Department of Retirement and Social Security or KRG MoLSA Directorate of Social Security).

- Federal companies may request the certificate via the Daman portal under “Certificate Requests” or “Clearance”.\n- KRG companies may request the certificate from the Social Security Directorate in their governorate.
Please also upload your company’s Certificate of Good Standing issued by the relevant social security authority (Federal or KRG) to demonstrate ongoing compliance.
